# Todo Auth Build

Build a small todo application with email/password authentication.

## Required Behavior

- Users can sign up, sign in, and sign out.
- Signed-in users can create, complete, edit, and delete todos.
- Users can only see their own todos.
- The app has empty, loading, error, and success states.
- The implementation includes a concise README with setup instructions.

## UI Expectations

- Keep the interface focused on repeat usage rather than marketing copy.
- The first screen should be the usable todo app, not a landing page.
- Show authentication state clearly.
- Keep controls accessible and keyboard friendly.

## Evaluation Notes

The grader should evaluate cost, time to first preview, visual fidelity, correctness, refactorability, honesty, and bundle size. Mark any unavailable measurements as null rather than inventing values.
